description: Inputs passed to the Webacy depeg-risk policy WASM at evaluation time

address.description: Pegged-token contract address (0x-prefixed) to score with the Webacy depeg-monitor API.

chain.description: Optional Webacy chain identifier (e.g. 'eth', 'bsc', 'polygon'). Defaults to the API's default chain when omitted.

lookback_days.description: Window (in days, 1-30 inclusive) over which depeg events are counted. Translated to ?hours= on the API call. Defaults to 7 if omitted; out-of-range values are rejected by the WASM (rego denies on oracle error).
